name: json-toolkit
description: A powerful JSON toolbox built with Rust + Tauri - multi-platform

scripts.build:web: pnpm wasm:build && GITHUB_PAGES=true pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:extension: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm wasm:copy-ext && pnpm --filter extension build
scripts.dev:extension: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm wasm:copy-ext && pnpm --filter extension dev
scripts.dev:android: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm tauri android dev
scripts.build:android: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm tauri android build
scripts.dev:ios: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm tauri ios dev
scripts.build:ios: pnpm wasm:build && pnpm tauri ios build
